_SYSTEM_INSTRUCTIONS.purpose: Any AI receiving the last message must read these instructions and execute accordingly

ai_contribution_log.description: Each AI that modifies this database MUST append its identity below

entries.changes_made: Merged expanded target list: +52 new unique targets (192→244)
Massive substance expansion: +450+ substances. Added resonance field. Option B execution with excipient/amino acid binding data preserved. Deduplicated existing entries.
entries.notes: All substances get entries. Non-resonant substances flagged with resonance:false and known_binding_outside_system field.

rules: Each AI MUST append a new entry upon ANY modification
Never remove or edit previous entries
Must include: ai_model, session_date, version_created, changes_made, substances_added, substances_modified, notes
Filter: only resonance:true in main table, separate appendix for resonance:false

resonance_system.description: Substances are classified by whether they meaningfully engage targets in the 244-target system
resonance_system.resonance_true: Substance hits ≥1 target in the 244-target master list with documented IC50/EC50/Ki
resonance_system.resonance_false: Substance has known biological binding but does NOT hit any target in the 244-target system. Their known binding is recorded in known_binding_outside_system field.
resonance_system.table_handling: resonance:true → main ranked table. resonance:false → appendix table.

_SYSTEM_INSTRUCTIONS.deployment_critical_rule: EVERY response must include: 1) Complete database.json, 2) json_table.json, 3) Rendered markdown table. NEVER truncate.

substances.name: Cenobamate

substances.target_list: Nrf2, KEAP1-, TNF-α-, IL-6-, NF-κB-, CYP1A2-

substances.name: Clozapine

substances.name: Quetiapine
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D2 (Ki 160nM), α1 (Ki 7nM), α2 (Ki 350nM), NET (Ki 58nM via norquetiapine)

substances.name: Aripiprazole
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D2 partial agonist (Ki 0.3nM), D3 (Ki 0.8nM), 5-HT1A partial agonist (Ki 1.7nM)

substances.name: Asenapine
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D1 (Ki 1.4nM), D2 (Ki 1.3nM), D3 (Ki 0.4nM), D4 (Ki 1.1nM), α1 (Ki 1.2nM), α2 (Ki 1.2nM)

substances.name: Cariprazine
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D2 partial agonist (Ki 0.5nM), D3 partial agonist (Ki 0.1nM), 5-HT1A (Ki 3nM)

substances.name: Brexpiprazole
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D2 partial agonist (Ki 0.3nM), 5-HT1A partial agonist (Ki 0.1nM), α1B (Ki 0.2nM), α2C (Ki 0.6nM)

substances.name: Varenicline
substances.known_binding_outside_system: α4β2 nAChR partial agonist (Ki 0.06nM), α3β4 (Ki 8nM), α7 (Ki 80nM)

substances.name: Ketamine
substances.target_list: NMDA/NR2B-, σ1, HCN1-, HCN2-, ADORA1-, TrkB, CREB pSer-133, Nav1.7-

substances.name: Esketamine
substances.target_list: NMDA/NR2B-, σ1, HCN1-, ADORA1-, TrkB, CREB pSer-133, Nav1.7-

substances.name: Ibogaine
substances.target_list: NMDA/NR2B-, σ1, κ-Opioid-, µ-Opioid, 5-HT2A, 5-HT2C-, ADORA1-, Nav1.7-

substances.name: Noribogaine
substances.target_list: µ-Opioid, κ-Opioid-, δ-Opioid, NMDA/NR2B-, σ1, 5-HT2A, ADORA1-

substances.name: Aspirin
substances.target_list: PGE2-, LOX-5-, PLA2-, NF-κB-, P-selectin-, TNF-α-

substances.name: Glycerol
substances.known_binding_outside_system: AQP3 facilitator. Osmotic laxative at high doses. No pharmacological receptor binding

substances.name: PEG-400
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Weak P-gp inhibition at high concentrations (>1%). No receptor binding

substances.name: Polysorbate 80
substances.known_binding_outside_system: P-gp inhibition at surfactant concentrations. No receptor binding

substances.name: Span 80
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Sorbitan monooleate. Emulsifier only. No known receptor binding

substances.name: Lactose Monohydrate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Hydrolyzed by lactase → glucose + galactose. Galectin substrate at mM. No pharmacological receptor binding

substances.name: Microcrystalline Cellulose
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Inert polymer. Bulk-forming. No receptor binding

substances.name: Magnesium Stearate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Fatty acid salt. Mg2+ released at trace levels. No pharmacological binding

substances.name: Silicon Dioxide
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Inorganic. No receptor binding. Flow agent only

substances.name: Croscarmellose Sodium
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Cross-linked cellulose polymer. Swells in water. No receptor binding

substances.name: Sodium Starch Glycolate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Modified starch. Superdisintegrant. No receptor binding

substances.name: HPMC
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Hydroxypropyl methylcellulose. Film-forming polymer. No receptor binding

substances.name: Ethylcellulose
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Hydrophobic cellulose ether. Sustained-release coat. No receptor binding

substances.name: Hypromellose Phthalate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: pH-dependent dissolution polymer. No receptor binding

substances.name: Methacrylic Acid Copolymer
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Eudragit polymer. pH-dependent release. No receptor binding

substances.name: Triethyl Citrate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Citrate ester plasticizer. Hydrolyzed to citric acid. No receptor binding

substances.name: Talc
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Mg silicate mineral. Anti-caking. No receptor binding

substances.name: Titanium Dioxide
substances.known_binding_outside_system: TiO2 pigment. UV blocker. Nanoparticle concerns but no receptor binding

substances.name: Iron Oxide Red
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Fe2O3. Trace iron release. Primarily colorant

substances.name: Benzyl Alcohol
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Weak GABAa positive allosteric modulator at mM. Local anesthetic at high conc

substances.name: Methylparaben
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Weak estrogenic (ERα Ki ~10µM, ERβ Ki ~30µM). Antimicrobial preservative

substances.name: Propylparaben
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Weak estrogenic (stronger than methylparaben). ERα Ki ~5µM

substances.name: Benzoic Acid
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Antimicrobial at pH <5. Conjugated with glycine → hippuric acid

substances.name: Propylene Glycol
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Humectant. GABAa weak PAM at extreme mM. CNS depressant at toxic doses

substances.name: Sorbitol
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Sugar alcohol. Osmotic. Aldose reductase substrate (IC50 ~20mM). No pharmacological receptor binding

substances.name: Mannitol
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Osmotic diuretic. Scavenges hydroxyl radicals weakly. No receptor binding

substances.name: Sucrose
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Disaccharide → glucose + fructose. T1R2/T1R3 taste receptor. No pharmacological binding

substances.name: Aspartame
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Dipeptide → aspartate + phenylalanine + methanol. T1R2/T1R3 (EC50 ~3mM). NMDA very weak (>10mM aspartate). No meaningful binding

substances.name: Acesulfame Potassium
substances.known_binding_outside_system: T1R2/T1R3 sweet taste receptor. Excreted unchanged. No pharmacological binding

substances.name: Sodium Cyclamate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Sweet taste. Converted to cyclohexylamine by gut flora. No pharmacological receptor binding

substances.name: MSG
substances.known_binding_outside_system: mGluR1-5 agonist (glutamate). NMDA co-agonist site (EC50 ~0.5mM). T1R1/T1R3 umami. Ionotropic GluR agonist

substances.name: Citric Acid
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Chelates Ca2+/Fe2+/Mg2+. TCA cycle intermediate. ASIC activator via pH drop

substances.name: Sodium Bicarbonate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Alkalinizing. CO2 liberation. No receptor binding

substances.name: Potassium Chloride
substances.known_binding_outside_system: K+ essential for resting membrane potential. Modulates all K+ channels. NMDA voltage-dependent Mg2+ block relief

substances.name: Glucosamine Sulfate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: MMP inhibitor (weak). Cartilage GAG precursor. NF-κB via IKK suppression

substances.name: Chondroitin Sulfate
substances.known_binding_outside_system: TLR4 weak antagonist. MMP inhibitor. Cartilage matrix component. P-selectin weak binder

substances.name: MSM
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Sulfur donor. Nrf2 weak activation. NF-κB p65 suppression (IC50 ~100µM)

substances.name: Hyaluronic Acid
substances.known_binding_outside_system: CD44 ligand. TLR2/4 agonist (low MW fragments). RHAMM ligand. Viscoelastic

substances.name: Collagen Peptides
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Hydroxyproline source. MMP substrate. Weak anti-inflammatory. Dipeptide Pro-Hyp bioactive

substances.name: Zeaxanthin
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Macular pigment. Singlet oxygen quencher. ROS scavenger. Weak NF-κB suppression

substances.name: Lutein
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Macular pigment. Blue light filter. ROS scavenger. Similar profile to zeaxanthin

substances.name: Astaxanthin
substances.target_list: Nrf2, KEAP1-, NF-κB-, TNF-α-, IL-6-, NADPH oxidase-
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Most potent carotenoid antioxidant. PPARγ weak. JAK/STAT3 inhibition. Crosses BBB

substances.name: Lycopene
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Singlet oxygen quencher (strongest). PPAR activation (weak). 5α-reductase weak inhibitor

substances.name: Beta-Carotene
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Provitamin A. BCO1 substrate → retinal. ROS scavenger. Pro-oxidant at high dose + smoking

substances.name: Chlorophyll
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Aflatoxin chelator (GI tract). Weak CYP1A2 modulator. Chlorophyllin → Cu complex antioxidant

substances.name: Spirulina
substances.target_list: Nrf2, KEAP1-, TNF-α-, IL-6-, NADPH oxidase-, NF-κB-
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Phycocyanin (C-PC) is active component. NADPH oxidase IC50 ~10µM (phycocyanin). iNOS suppression. Lipase inhibition

substances.name: Chlorella
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Chlorella Growth Factor. Heavy metal chelation (Cd, Pb). IFN-γ stimulation. NK cell activation

substances.name: Wheatgrass
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Chlorophyll + apigenin + luteolin content. SOD activity. Hemoglobin support

substances.name: Barley Grass
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Saponarin (flavonoid). SOD-like activity. Weak α-glucosidase inhibition

substances.name: Alfalfa
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Coumestrol content (phytoestrogen). Saponins. Cholesterol binding in GI tract

substances.name: Holy Basil
substances.target_list: LOX-5-, Nrf2, KEAP1-, TNF-α-, IL-6-, NF-κB-, CYP2C9-
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Eugenol, rosmarinic acid, ursolic acid content. COX-1/2 inhibition. Adaptogenic. Cortisol modulation

substances.name: Dandelion Root
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Taraxasterol content. Chicoric acid. Prebiotic (inulin). Hepatoprotective

substances.name: Burdock Root
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Arctigenin (lignan). Prebiotic (inulin). Arctiin → arctigenin by gut flora

substances.name: Yellow Dock
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Anthraquinones. Iron-rich herb. Mild laxative. Emodin content

substances.name: Sarsaparilla
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Sarsasapogenin. Endotoxin-binding saponins. Anti-inflammatory. CYP3A4 weak inhibitor

substances.name: Nettle Leaf
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Scopoletin, β-sitosterol. SHBG binding. COX/LOX dual inhibition. Histamine release inhibition

substances.name: Elderberry
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Anthocyanins (cyanidin-3-glucoside). Neuraminidase inhibition. Hemagglutinin binding. IFN-β induction

substances.name: Echinacea Purpurea
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Alkylamides (CB2 Ki ~60nM). Cichoric acid. Immunostimulant. FAAH inhibitor

substances.name: Goldenseal
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Berberine + hydrastine content. Same berberine pharmacology (id:17) but with CYP inhibition

substances.name: Astragalus
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Astragaloside IV. Cycloastragenol (telomerase activator). IFN-γ inducer. NK cell activation

substances.name: Reishi Mushroom
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Ganoderic acids. β-glucans (Dectin-1 agonist). Triterpenes. 5αR2 IC50 ~10µM (ganoderic acid)

substances.name: Shiitake Mushroom
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Lentinan (β-glucan). AHCC. Eritadenine (cholesterol lowering). IFN-γ inducer

substances.name: Cordyceps Sinensis
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Cordycepin (3'-deoxyadenosine). Adenosine analog. AMPK activator. mTOR inhibitor. Anti-fatigue

substances.name: Valerian Root
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Valerenic acid (GABAa PAM, IC50 ~20µM). Isovaleric acid. GABA content. 5-HT5A (weak)

substances.name: Passionflower
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Chrysin (GABAa). Vitexin. Harmine/harmaline (MAO-A inhibition, IC50 ~5nM). BZD site partial agonist

substances.name: Lemon Balm
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Rosmarinic acid content. GABAa transaminase inhibition. AChE weak inhibition. Thyroid (TSH receptor)

substances.name: Chamomile
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Apigenin content (GABAa, BZD site). Bisabolol. Chamazulene. Matricin. Anti-spasmodic

substances.name: Peppermint Oil
substances.target_list: TRPM8+, TRPV1, TRPA1-, GABAa, Nav1.7-, TNF-α-
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Menthol (TRPM8 EC50 4µM). 5-HT3 antagonist (menthol). Smooth muscle relaxant. CYP3A4 weak inhibition

substances.name: Oregano Oil
substances.target_list: TRPV1, TRPA1-, Macrobial-, Fungal-, TNF-α-, Nrf2
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Carvacrol (id:122) + Thymol (id:123) content. Broad antimicrobial. p-Cymene

substances.name: Thyme Oil
substances.target_list: TRPV1, TRPA1-, Macrobial-, Fungal-, TNF-α-, GABAa

substances.name: Clove Oil
substances.target_list: TRPV1, TRPA1-, Nav1.7-, Macrobial-, Fungal-, TNF-α-
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Eugenol (85%). Nav1.7 (IC50 ~0.2mM). COX-2 inhibition. TRPV1 agonist then desensitizer

substances.name: Cinnamon Bark Oil
substances.target_list: TRPA1-, α-Gluc-, Macrobial-, Fungal-, TNF-α-, PPAR-γ
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Cinnamaldehyde (TRPA1 EC50 ~60µM). Coumarin content. Insulin sensitizer. α-Glucosidase IC50 ~3µM

substances.name: Frankincense Oil
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Boswellic acids content (id:158-160). α-Pinene. Incensole acetate (TRPV3 agonist)

substances.name: Sandalwood Oil
substances.known_binding_outside_system: α-Santalol, β-Santalol. Olfactory receptor OR2AT4 (skin wound healing). Anti-inflammatory

substances.name: Ylang Ylang Oil
substances.known_binding_outside_system: Linalool content. Benzyl acetate. p-Cresyl methyl ether. Anxiolytic via inhalation

substances.name: Lemon Oil
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D-Limonene (90%). γ-Terpinene. Citral. D-Limonene: GST inducer, anxiolytic via inhalation

substances.name: Orange Oil
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D-Limonene (95%). Same limonene pharmacology as lemon oil. Anxiolytic via inhalation

substances.name: Grapefruit Oil
substances.known_binding_outside_system: D-Limonene (90%). Nootkatone. Bergamottin/naringin → CYP3A4 inhibition (grapefruit effect)

covered_by: (partially - neuropeptide W/B endogenous only, no drug in database yet)
(downstream of D1 signaling — no direct ligand added)
